facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 226 reviews. And somehow Bún Quậy Bạch Đằng stays off most tourist itineraries.

This is where locals in Phú Quốc actually eat bún quậy. The noodles are silky, the broth is clean, the portions are real. No English menu boards, no upsell, just the dish done right.

32A Đường Bạch Đằng. Go early. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the broth hit the bowl at Bún Quậy Bạch Đằng. 4.9 stars, 226 locals don't lie. Address in our bio. 32A Đường Bạch Đằng, Phú Quốc.
